title: RenderPipeline
description: An ordered list of RenderPass steps, played once per frame against a RenderingContext. A `RenderPipeline` is **itself a `RenderPass`**, so pipelines nest freely and a disabled pipeline skips its whole subtree. It **owns** the passes added to it (exclusive ownership — a pass belongs to at most one pipeline): resize and destroy cascade to them. It never owns scene nodes or caller RenderTextures. Adding a pass that would create a direct or indirect cycle throws at add time.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: An ordered list of RenderPass steps, played once per frame against a RenderingContext.

A `RenderPipeline` is **itself a `RenderPass`**, so pipelines nest freely and a disabled pipeline skips its whole subtree. It **owns** the passes added to it (exclusive ownership — a pass belongs to at most one pipeline): resize and destroy cascade to them. It never owns scene nodes or caller RenderTextures. Adding a pass that would create a direct or indirect cycle throws at add time.

members.name: [iterator]
members.description: Iterate registered passes in play order.

members.name: addPass
members.description: Append a pass and take exclusive ownership of it. Throws if the pass already belongs to any pipeline, if adding it would create a direct/indirect cycle, during execute, or after destroy.

members.name: at
members.description: The pass at index in play order, or undefined if out of range.

members.name: clear
members.description: Remove all passes and release their ownership. Does not destroy them. The pipeline stays usable.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Cascade destroy() to every pass, release their ownership, then clear the list. Idempotent. Throws during execute (before any teardown begins). Best-effort teardown: the pipeline is marked destroyed and detached from its passes up front, so it always ends in a single, consistent destroyed-and-empty state — every child gets a destroy() attempt and has its owner slot released even if an earlier child throws. If one or more children throw, the first error is re-thrown after the cascade completes.

members.name: execute
members.description: Play every enabled pass in order against context. No-op if this.enabled === false (a pipeline is itself a directly-executable pass, so disabling it skips its whole subtree). Not re-entrant. Throws after destroy.

members.name: hasPass
members.description: Whether pass is registered in this pipeline.

members.name: indexOf
members.description: Index of pass in play order, or -1 if absent.

members.name: insertPass
members.description: Insert a pass at index (clamped to [0, size]). Same ownership / cycle / execute / destroy throws as addPass.

members.name: removePass
members.description: Remove a pass by identity and release its ownership. Returns false if absent. Does not destroy it.

members.name: resize
members.description: Cascade resize(width, height) to every pass (enabled and disabled).

members.name: enabled
members.description: When false, the containing RenderPipeline skips this pass during execute. Default true. Evaluated by the parent — a direct execute call runs the pass regardless.

members.name: label
members.description: Debug label (inspector / logging). Defaults to the constructor name. Display only — not an identity.

members.name: size
members.description: Number of registered passes (enabled and disabled).
